name: atomic-authority-agent
description: HITL LinkedIn content engine for the Nuclear/AI niche

scripts.status: powershell -Command "if (Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*scheduler/index.ts*' }) { Write-Host 'Scheduler is RUNNING' } else { Write-Host 'Scheduler is NOT running' }"
scripts.stop-scheduler: powershell -Command "$procs = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @('node.exe','cmd.exe') -and $_.CommandLine -like '*scheduler/index.ts*' -and $_.CommandLine -notlike '*powershell*' }; if ($procs) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Stopped PID' $_.ProcessId }; Write-Host 'Scheduler stopped.' } else { Write-Host 'Scheduler is not running.' }"
scripts.restart-scheduler: powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @('node.exe','cmd.exe') -and $_.CommandLine -like '*scheduler/index.ts*' -and $_.CommandLine -notlike '*powershell*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Stopped PID' $_.ProcessId }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; wscript 'C:\dev\atomic-authority-agent\run-hidden.vbs'; Write-Host 'Scheduler relaunched.'"
